findings.title: Remove raw AI conversation transcript from the repository
findings.impact: The newly checked-in transcript exposes assistant hidden reasoning, model/tool metadata, source snippets, and command results to anyone with repository access. This normalizes committing raw agent logs, which can easily include credentials, private endpoints, or sensitive operational output in future runs.
findings.fix: Delete the .conversations transcript from the PR and keep raw agent logs outside version control. If a transcript artifact is required, add a redacted, purpose-built summary instead and ignore the raw .conversations directory.
